_readme: The problem statement for this experiment. Physics agents receive this raw. Non-physics agents (if meta_comm is enabled) receive a MetaCommunicator translation of it.
title: Short Title of the Problem
core_question: The central question agents will discuss. Be precise and open-ended enough to sustain multiple rounds.

background.summary: 2–4 paragraphs of context. What is known, what is contested, why it matters.

core_tensions.tension_name_1: Description of the first fundamental tension or unresolved conflict.
core_tensions.tension_name_3: Add as many tensions as relevant.
